home.group_job_description: Start a new job and invite others to work together
home.groups_description: Join existing groups and work as a team
home.job_header_descriptions: Looking for a stable, rewarding job? Join Gruppe 6 Security Services! As a security professional, you'll play a crucial role in protecting valuable assets and ensuring safe transport operations. Enjoy competitive pay, excellent benefits, and the satisfaction of making a difference every day. Work with a dedicated team, operate armored vehicles, and experience the dynamic streets of Los Santos from a unique perspective. No prior experience required; we provide all necessary training.

competitive_pay.title: Competitive Pay
competitive_pay.description: Earn great wages with performance bonuses

flexible_hours.title: Flexible Hours
flexible_hours.description: Work when it suits you best

career_growth.title: Career Growth
career_growth.description: Advance through skill levels and unlock new abilities

team_environment.title: Team Environment
team_environment.description: Work solo or join forces with other operators
